data.name: Glitch Hearts
data.detailed_description:
GLITCH HEARTS 是一款什麼樣的遊戲

GLITCH HEARTS 是一款平靜而親密的益智遊戲，故事從一名女孩的視角展開。她正在使用交友網站並與其他女孩相識。
你可以閱讀她的私人對話、查看女孩們的個人資料，並逐步解鎖更火熱、更感性的場景。

玩法十分簡單。你連接泡泡、完成任務並在關卡中向前推進。
隨著進度前進，你會解鎖新的場景，女孩們也會變得更加坦率和誘人。

女主角與關卡

遊戲中共有七位女主角，每位都有獨特的風格、個性與魅力。

總共有十九個關卡
• 第一位女主角有一個關卡
• 其餘六位各有三個關卡

之後，每位女孩都會獲得額外場景，包括
• 私人聊天
• 逐步脫衣的互動
• 近距離視角與 Live2D 動畫
• 隨玩家動作而反應的身體動作
• 呼吸、微動作與眼神等細膩的存在感效果

每個關卡都讓你更接近她最私密的一面。

視覺風格

遊戲融合感性的動畫風格與霓虹夜景氛圍。
溫暖光影、柔和陰影以及深色調共同營造出親密而迷人的感覺。

音效

背景音樂以緩慢、放鬆的電子音為主。
它輕柔地陪伴整個遊戲並增強親近感。
畫面上的小型播放器圖示可讓你自由切換曲目。

主要特色

• 七位女主角
• 十九個關卡
• 每位女孩都有額外的親密場景
• 私人訊息聊天
• 逐步脫衣與互動感
• Live2D 動畫與身體物理效果
• 流暢易懂的益智玩法
• 放鬆系電子音樂與 glitch 美術風格

適合哪些玩家

適合想要輕鬆、無壓力的情色體驗的玩家。
按自己的步調遊玩，探索女孩們的故事並感受她們的存在。
這款遊戲旨在透過溫柔的謎題與暖心互動讓你放鬆。

注意事項

本遊戲包含裸露與親密內容，僅適合十八歲以上的成人遊玩。
所有角色皆為虛構並已成年。

data.short_description: GLITCH HEARTS 是一款平靜而帶有情色氛圍的益智遊戲，由一名女孩的視角展開，她在交友網站上認識其他女性。 以自己的節奏遊玩，在私密聊天中互動，瀏覽角色資料並逐步解鎖火熱場景。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 繁體中文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 (or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: with 1 GB VRAM compatible with DirectX
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Compatible with DirectX

data.name: Glitch Hearts
data.detailed_description:
GLITCH HEARTS — what kind of game is it?

GLITCH HEARTS is a calm, intimate puzzle game told from the perspective of a girl exploring a dating site and meeting other girls.
You can read her private chats, browse profiles, and gradually unlock hotter and more intimate scenes.

The core gameplay is simple. You connect bubbles, complete tasks, and progress through the levels.
With every step forward, you unlock scenes where the girls open up more and show their playful side.

Heroines and Levels

There are 7 heroines, each with her own style, personality, and way of expressing herself.

The game features 19 levels:
• the first heroine has 1 level
• the other 6 have 3 each

After that, every girl receives additional scenes that include:
• a private chat messenger
• progressive undressing
• close-up views and Live2D animations
• body movements that react to your actions
• soft presence effects like breathing, micro-movements, and eye focus

Each level brings you closer to her most intimate side.

Visual Style

The game blends erotic anime-style scenes with neon and night-city atmosphere.
Warm reflections, soft shadows, and deep colors create an intimate mood that enhances every moment.

Sound

The music is slow, relaxing electronic.
It plays gently in the background, supporting the feeling of closeness.
A small player icon lets you switch tracks whenever you like.

Key Features

• 7 heroines
• 19 gameplay levels
• additional intimate scenes for each girl
• private chat messenger
• progressive undressing and presence
• Live2D animations and body physics
• smooth and easy-to-understand puzzle gameplay
• relaxing electronic soundtrack and glitch aesthetics

Who is this game for?

For players who want a calm, erotic experience without pressure.
Play at your own pace, discover each girl’s story, and slowly explore her world.
The game is designed to help you unwind through gentle puzzles and warm interactions, letting you feel the girls’ presence.

Warning

The game contains nudity and intimate content intended for adults (18+).
All characters are fictional and over 18 years old.

data.short_description: GLITCH HEARTS is a calm erotic puzzle game told from a girl’s perspective as she meets other women on a dating site. Play at your pace, chat intimately, explore profiles and unlock hot scenes in a soft, intimate atmosphere.
data.supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • Processor: Intel Core i3 (or equivalent)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: with 1 GB VRAM compatible with DirectX
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Compatible with DirectX
